raw_consumer_statement: This is an update on previous complaint # XXXX. I am still receiving bills for items not purchased in particular jewelry. Each time this is reported either they take purchase off the bill or send me a new card. This time I did not activate the card just to see what happens. Someone still was able to make a large purchase without card being activated. I sent a secure message regarding the incident. In previous complaint some from Best Buy Executive office called and said that I didn't have to worry since I would not be liable for the previous unauthorized purchases.I was also informed that i some states identity is not verfied. Interesting enough, my XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX card was also compromised but declined the purchase and immediately contacted me. What I don't understand is why did Best Buy authorize another purchase when I continue to be the subject of a fraud. I will try to contact Best buy again but their automated system is too robotic and doesn't always work. Calling the Fraud Dept is too time consuming so I have to keep trying.
